title: NGRI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 07 Senior Project Associate Posts
description: The National Geophysical Research Institute (NGRI) has officially released the notiifcation to fill the vacancies of 07 Project Associate I, II, Senior Project Associate, and Research Associate I Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech, M.Sc, Ph.D. can apply for the NGRI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have men...
